name: Peanut Soup with Okra Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick pot, heat the peanut oil over moderate heat. Add the crushed red pepper flakes and coriander seeds. Fry until the seeds begin to darken.
2. Add the diced celery, carrot, butternut squash, potatoes, peanuts, stock, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Cook for 3 minutes.
3. Pour in the remaining stock and bring to a boil. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Cool slightly, then puree the soup. Gently reheat, add more lemon juice if desired, and season with salt and pepper.
5. Serve the soup in shallow bowls garnished with okra croutons.
CROUTONS:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Rinse the okra under running water, drain well, and pat dry with paper towels.
3. In a resealable plastic bag, combine cornmeal, cumin, cayenne, herbal salt, and okra. Seal the bag and shake until evenly coated.
4. Spray an oven-safe baking sheet with oil. Arrange the okra slices in a single layer on the sheet and spray them with additional oil.
5. Bake for 30 minutes, stirring and spraying again at the halfway point, until crisp and browned.
